name: Alisa
description:
Alisa is a business owner on Ganymede.

Alisa had a relationship with Jet Black for a long time in the early 2060s when he worked for the ISSP. However, she became increasingly unsatisfied, as she felt she had no independence outside of their relationship. One day, she decided she had to end it and left Jet, leaving for him a watch and a note that simply said, "Farewell."

Alisa started to run a bar called La Fin by 2071. However, business became slow as the area was much less trafficked than it used to be. Alisa decided to take out a loan with Law Rentzuo in order to keep the bar open.

(Source: Cowboy Bebop Fandom Wikia)
